Above Respiratory Treatments Respiratory treatments utilized at home: none of the above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0500_RESPTX_OXYGN (M0500) Oxygen Respiratory treatments utilized at home: oxygen (intermittent or continuous). 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
M0500_RESPTX_VENT (M0500) Ventilator Respiratory treatments utilized at home: ventilator (continually or at night). 0 = No, 1 = Yes CHAR 1 x x
